# Freeze Checklist Template

Purpose: enforce freeze controls before lifting release freeze status.

```text
Artifact Type: freeze_checklist
Freeze ID:
Rollout ID:
Release/Change Ref:
Freeze Window Start (UTC):
Freeze Window End (UTC):
Owner:
Reviewer/Approver:

Gate Status:
- Global validation gates status (pass/fail):
- WS19 SLO gate status (pass/fail):
- WS20 stage gate status (pass/fail):
- WS21 rollback evidence status (pass/fail):

Risk and Findings:
- Open P0 findings count:
- Open P1 findings count:
- Rollback trigger status (clear/active):
- Exceptions approved (yes/no):
- Exception evidence:

Decision:
- Freeze lift approved (yes/no):
- Decision timestamp (UTC):
- Final notes:
```
